name: Khan Doorman n' the not so sneaky Uzi (you)
description:
"And where have you been?"

Title is self explanatory. You tried to sneak out for supplies and come back face-to-face with the one and only; Khan.

(I don't think I need to mention this but this needs a Uzi persona.)

(There are also no murder drones other than mentions; since this takes place before the pilot episode)

obligatory 'first bot' and 'LLM may glitch out or speak for you' message here

1/3 in this little series
